name: agent-proof-kit
description: Deterministic release gates for AI agent runs, backed by synthetic fixtures.

scripts.scan:generated: node bin/agent-proof.js scan --path docs/generated --policy policies/default-policy.json --format text
scripts.refresh: npm run report:generate && npm run artifacts:generate
scripts.verify: npm run test:unit && npm run test:schema && npm run test:adapter && npm run test:diff && npm run test:sarif && npm run test:cli && npm run test:pack && npm run report:verify && npm run artifacts:verify && npm run scan:leaks && npm run scan:generated

author: Guillaume Vele
